hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[^a-zA-Z0-9_])npm($|[^a-zA-Z0-9_])'; then jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", permissionDecision: "deny", permissionDecisionReason: "This project uses pnpm. Use `pnpm` instead of `npm` (e.g. `pnpm install`, `pnpm add <pkg>`, `pnpm run <script>`)."}}'; fi
